name: @rezahh107/pr-inspector-prompt-renderer
description: Private historical compatibility sentinel for the retired PR-Inspector v1.11.0 projection renderer; active v1.11.1 output fails closed.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run typecheck:contract && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "throw new Error('NOT_PUBLISHED: historical compatibility only')"
